title: Support empty queue as dynarray default value
body:
Previous error messages:
```
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: t/t_dynarray_init.v:16:15: Unsupported/Illegal: empty queue ('{}') in this assign context
                                             : ... note: In instance 't'
   16 |    int a5[] = {};
      |               ^
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: t/t_queue_empty_pin.v:8:23: Unsupported/Illegal: empty queue ('{}') in this context
                                              : ... note: In instance 't'
    8 |    task tsk(int q[] = {});
      |                       ^
```
